title: cardamine californica var. gemmata
intro: Cardamine californica var. gemmata is a variety of the western bittercress plant, a perennial herb native to the western United States and Canada, known for its edible leaves and roots. The medicinal properties of Cardamine californica var. gemmata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Cardamine californica var. gemmata include making tea from its leaves and roots, as well as using its extract in tinctures and salves.
